question: What services do you offer?
answer: We offer ERP Integration, CRM Services, Custom Development, Cloud Consulting, Cloud Hosting and VPS Services. Visit the Services page to learn more about each.

question: Which industries do you work with?
answer: We serve Banking & Finance, Healthcare, Retail, Manufacturing and Education. Check out the Industries page for details on each sector.

question: How can I contact you?
answer: You can reach us at contact@ai-solution.com.np or +977 1 4123456. You can also fill out the form on our Contact page and we'll get back to you.

question: Where are you located?
answer: Our office is at Durbar Marg, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal. We work with clients across all 7 provinces of Nepal.

question: Do you offer cloud hosting?
answer: Yes. We provide enterprise-grade Cloud Hosting with a 99.9% uptime SLA, auto-scaling, and 24/7 monitoring, plus high-performance VPS Services with dedicated resources.

question: Can you build custom software?
answer: Absolutely. Our Custom Development team builds bespoke software from scratch — including API integration, microservices, CI/CD setup, full QA, and ongoing support.

question: Are there any upcoming events?
answer: Yes! We host events like the AI & Enterprise Summit and Cloud Transformation Workshops. Visit our Events/Gallery section to see the latest schedule.

question: How do I request a quote or demo?
answer: Head to our Contact page and submit an inquiry with your requirements. Our team will reach out to schedule a demo or prepare a tailored quote.

question: What are your business hours?
answer: Our support team is available 24/7 for hosting and infrastructure. For sales and consulting, we're available Sunday to Friday, 9am–6pm NPT.
